# Your first agent example

<!-- source: 05-github-copilot.qmd, section "Agent mode: Automated workflows" / "Exploring agent mode"
     (the pres.topa ~ cb_cover regression + plotting example, incl. the pirate-prompt aside) -->

Run an agent end-to-end on the benthic/fish data: fit a regression, make a plot, and see what it does without you writing the code.

::: {.callout-important title="Challenge" appearance="simple"}
TODO: challenge re-running the same prompt twice and comparing outputs.
:::
